reason_for_decision: The article passes as a foundation guide because it explains target tracking and track-while-scan in clear operational terms without flattening the estimation and track-management challenges.
strengths: The article distinguishes detection from tracking very clearly, which is the right starting point for beginners.
It explains track files, track initiation, coasting, and termination without becoming over-technical.
The sections on why large TWS numbers can mislead are especially useful.
summary_assessment: This is a strong pass for an introductory article. It is readable, technically disciplined, and helps readers understand why tracking quality matters more than one feature word on a datasheet.
